title: Almond Croissant
description: Flaky, buttery croissant filled with almond frangipane and topped with toasted sliced almonds and a light dusting of sugar. Crisp edges, soft center, and deeply nutty with a sweet, bakery-style finish.

title: Croissant
description: Golden, ultra-flaky layers baked until crisp on the outside and tender inside. Fine butter aroma with a lightly sweet, savory bite. Simple, airy, and perfectly comforting.

title: Brownie
description: Rich cocoa brownie with a delicate crackly top and a dense, melt-in-the-middle crumb. Deep chocolate flavor with a smooth, buttery finish. Decadent, chewy, and seriously satisfying.

title: Cardamom Bun
description: Soft, twisted pastry bun scented with warm cardamom and baked until glossy and golden. Finished with a sprinkle of sugar and spice for a subtle crunch. Fragrant, lightly sweet, and beautifully aromatic.

title: cinnamon roll
description: Fluffy spiral roll swirled with cinnamon-sugar and topped with a smooth, tangy-sweet frosting. Soft, gooey center with a buttery, spiced finish. Classic, cozy, and indulgent.

title: Chocolate Babka
allergens: Wheat/Gluten; Dairy; Eggs; Tree nuts; Soy
description: Tender, rich dough wrapped with chocolate filling and baked into a soft, pull-apart pastry. Glazed on top and finished with crunchy chopped nuts for texture. Chocolate-forward, buttery, and extra comforting.

title: Crème Caramel
description: Smooth vanilla custard set to a delicate wobble and topped with a glossy caramel layer that melts into a rich sauce. Smooth, light, and luxuriously creamy. Sweet, elegant, and perfectly balanced.

title: Açai Bowl
allergens: Tree nuts/Peanuts; Gluten (Granola/Oats); Dairy (if yogurt); Coconut
description: Fresh, chilled açaí blend topped with crunchy granola, fresh diced fruit, chia pudding, and a generous scoop of nut butter. Finished with a snowy sprinkle of coconut. Bright, fruity, and energizing with a creamy-crunchy bite.

title: Coconut Cake
description: Moist golden sponge layered with creamy coconut frosting and coated in fine coconut flakes. Finished with delicate coconut shavings on top for extra texture. Sweet, tropical, and irresistibly soft.

title: Cheescake with Berry Sauce
description: Smooth, creamy cheesecake on a buttery biscuit base, served with a glossy mixed-berry compote. Bright fruit tang cuts through the richness for a balanced bite. Velvety, refreshing, and indulgent.

title: Pain Au Chocolat
description: Crisp, laminated pastry baked until deeply golden and filled with rich chocolate. Shatteringly flaky on the outside with a soft, buttery center and melty chocolate bites throughout. Classic, chocolatey, and seriously satisfying.

title: Peanut Butter Tarte
description: Silky peanut butter custard set in a dark chocolate cookie crust and topped with a glossy chocolate ganache and a pinch of flaky salt. Sweet-salty, ultra-creamy, and intensely peanutty with a chocolate snap. Bold, rich, and super comforting.

title: Sea Salt Nutella Cookie
allergens: Wheat/Gluten; Dairy; Eggs; Tree nuts (Hazelnut); Soy
description: Sea Salt Nutella Cookie - chewy, bakery-style cookie loaded with chocolate-hazelnut goodness and finished with a sprinkle of flaky sea salt. Crisp edges, soft center, and a deep cocoa-hazelnut finish. Sweet, salty, and dangerously moreish.

title: Rangeena
description: Buttery, syrup-kissed pastry slice topped with golden kataifi strands, a drizzle of dark syrup, and a generous shower of crushed pistachios. Crisp, sticky, and nutty with warm caramel notes. Luxurious, fragrant, and beautifully indulgent.

title: White Chocolate Saffron
description: White Chocolate Saffron Cookie - soft-baked cookie studded with creamy white chocolate and perfumed with delicate saffron. Lightly crisp on the edges with a tender, buttery middle. Floral, sweet, and extra cozy with a golden finish.

title: Tiramisu
description: Airy mascarpone cream layered with coffee-soaked ladyfingers and finished with a generous dusting of cocoa. Soft, creamy, and lightly bittersweet with a smooth espresso finish. Elegant, velvety, and perfectly comforting.

title: Vanilla Bun
description: Buttery spiral bun with a soft, brioche-like crumb and a creamy vanilla center. Baked until glossy and golden with gentle caramelized edges. Sweet, fragrant, and comfortingly classic.

title: Greek Yogurt Bowl
description: Thick, creamy Greek yogurt layered with crunchy granola, vibrant berry compote, coconut flakes, and a rich nutty drizzle. Creamy-meets-crunchy with a bright, fruity tang. Fresh, filling, and perfectly balanced.
